headline: Will Costco's famous hot dog combo stay at $1.50? CEO tells all
summary: In a world seemingly full of raw deals, the price of a hot dog and a soda at Costco hasn’t gone up in 40 years. Will it stay $1.50?

raw.headline: Will Costco's famous hot dog combo stay at $1.50? CEO tells all
raw.summary: In a world seemingly full of raw deals, the price of a hot dog and a soda at Costco hasn’t gone up in 40 years. Will it stay $1.50?

headline: A Look At McDonald's (MCD) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent performance snapshot for McDonald's (MCD) Without a specific news headline driving McDonald's (MCD) today, investors are likely watching how the stock’s recent pullback compares with its longer term returns and current earnings profile. See our latest analysis for McDonald's. McDonald's recent 3.6% 30 day share price decline to US$315.73 comes after a modest 4.1% year to date share price return, while the 5 year total shareholder return of 57.9% points to a longer term, income...

headline: Market Madness: Why JPMorgan, McDonald's are slam dunk stock picks
summary: Tipping off Yahoo Finance's "Market Madness" bracket tournament, Winthrop Capital CIO Adam Coons joins Julie Hyman to make the case for the first round of corporate match-ups, which includes JPMorgan Chase (JPM) vs. TJX (TJX) and McDonald's (MCD) vs. Disney (DIS).

headline: Dutch Bros Loyalty Hits 15M Members: Is Engagement Driving Sales?
summary: BROS loyalty hits 15M members, driving 72% of transactions as data, personalization and digital tools fuel higher traffic and repeat visits.

raw.headline: Dutch Bros Loyalty Hits 15M Members: Is Engagement Driving Sales?

headline: These 6 restaurant chains will close hundreds of units this year
summary: From Wendy’s to Papa Johns and Pizza Hut, chains facing several quarters of consecutive same-store sales and traffic declines are removing underperforming units from their systems.

raw.headline: These 6 restaurant chains will close hundreds of units this year
raw.summary: From Wendy’s to Papa Johns and Pizza Hut, chains facing several quarters of consecutive same-store sales and traffic declines are removing underperforming units from their systems.
